text: You just joined a new company. What kind of company do you hope it is?

options.text: An industry giant with deep history and solid systems, stable and glorious.
A startup dark horse, even if small now, full of ambition to break old rules.

text: When playing competitive games (like League or Dota), your core strategy is?

options.text: Invade the enemy jungle aggressively from the start and control the tempo.
Play safe early, bait enemies in, then punish one mistake to end the game late.

text: Your team hits a fatal bug never seen before, with only 3 hours until delivery. Your reaction?

options.text: Call the tech wizard or go into overdrive yourself to solo-fix it.
Immediately organize a quick all-hands meeting to divide and conquer systematically.

text: When completing an important work task, which mindset do you agree with more?

options.text: Results matter most. Even if the process is messy or pragmatic, just get it done on time.
Not just done, the process and code structure must be elegant. That's my bottom line and romance.

text: When explaining a complex concept to others, your expression habit is usually:

options.text: Start from background, unravel thread by thread, lay out all details and logic chains.
Drop the conclusion and core pain point directly, get to the point, save every word possible.

text: If you start badly (falling far behind) in an exam or competition you deeply care about, your mental state is:

options.text: Mentally easy to collapse, feeling the game is over, hard to refocus.
反而会被激发出一种可怕的斗志，越是绝境我越兴奋！

text: Weekend escape room with friends, you encounter a door that just won't open. You would:

options.text: Believe in brute force, try pushing/pulling hard or directly breaking it.
Calm down and look for tiny clues, try using finesse and mechanism logic to solve it.

text: Facing unpredictable market changes (or sudden situations), you tend to:

options.text: Adapt to each situation, always ready to overturn original plans, flexibly adapt to new rules.
Respond to change with constancy. Believe in your proven system, fight change with execution.

text: When watching movies or reading novels, which plot moves you more?

options.text: The orthodox prince's revenge story, restoring the family's former glory.
A small-town youth with no background climbing over tycoons and elites to reach the top.

text: When in fierce argument with someone, your attack style leans more toward:

options.text: Strike first, suppress the opponent with rapid-fire reasoning, give no breathing room.
Coldly observe their output, catch a logic flaw, then deliver one fatal blow.

text: If you were a special ops squad commander, when selecting team members you value more:

options.text: A 'thorny' soldier king with extremely outstanding individual ability who can create miracles at critical moments.
An ordinary soldier with balanced abilities who absolutely obeys orders, perfectly executing tactical gear roles.

text: In relationships or friendships, if an irreconcilable real-world conflict arises, you would:

options.text: Cut losses in time, even if painful, make the most rational and practical decision.
Choose emotionality, believe in fate and miracles, act on impulse once more for inner purity.

text: Planning a long trip, how do you pack your suitcase?

options.text: Categorize and pack, even charging cables must be neatly wrapped, enjoying the security of controlling every detail.
Throw in a few clothes randomly, if missing something just buy it locally, go with the flow.

text: In work/study, when do you feel most efficient?

options.text: When everything goes smoothly, resources are abundant, time is plentiful, everything proceeds according to plan.
When pushed to the cliff edge, when everyone thinks I can't handle it.

text: In sports (like basketball or football), what talent do you rely on more?

options.text: Speed, strength, explosiveness, overpowering opponents with physical attributes.
Vision, rhythm sense, delicate technique, outplaying opponents with brain and football IQ.

text: You have a restaurant you often eat at and love. Tonight you're dining with friends, you would:

options.text: Decisively take friends to that old reliable shop, safe and never a miss.
Suggest trying that newly opened place on the corner, take a risk for a change of flavor.

text: If one day you had massive wealth, you would:

options.text: Buy mansions and sports cars, maintain your social class, enjoy the top-tier lifestyle.
Set up a foundation or venture capital to discover and fund talented平民 geniuses with nothing.

text: When people you don't like gossip about you behind your back, your approach is:

options.text: Confront them directly, call things out, never take hidden losses.
Ignore them, focus on your own work, use ultimate success to slap their faces.

text: In a band, which role do you most want to play?

options.text: The lead singer or lead guitarist in the spotlight, attracting all attention.
The bassist or drummer steadily outputting rhythm in the back, the soul foundation of the whole song.

text: Finally at the last question! Now, without considering any tactics, what does football mean to you?

options.text: Winner takes all. Only by lifting the World Cup can one be remembered by history.
A belief. Even without championships, those glorious moments and spiritual totems are immortal.
